# Requirements Quality Checklist: InnovatEPAM Portal

**Purpose**: Validate whether the requirements are complete, clear, consistent, measurable, and implementation-ready across US1-US6 for reviewer gate use.
**Created**: 2026-02-25
**Feature**: [Feature Specification](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are all required registration data elements explicitly specified, including full name, email, password, and confirm-password matching rule? [Completeness, Spec §US1 Acceptance, Spec §FR-001, Spec §FR-046]
- [x] CHK002 Are password reset completion requirements complete regarding token validity, password policy, and confirm-password match constraints? [Completeness, Spec §US1 Acceptance, Spec §FR-015, Spec §FR-017]
- [x] CHK003 Are idea submission input requirements complete, including required fields, category enumeration, and single-attachment constraints? [Completeness, Spec §US2 Acceptance, Spec §FR-022, Spec §FR-023, Spec §FR-047]
- [x] CHK004 Are listing query requirements complete for pagination, filtering dimensions, and sorting options? [Completeness, Spec §US2 Acceptance, Spec §FR-054, Spec §FR-055, Spec §FR-056]
- [x] CHK005 Are evaluation lifecycle requirements complete for transitions, finalization comments, status history persistence, and timeline visibility? [Completeness, Spec §US3 Acceptance, Spec §FR-033, Spec §FR-034, Spec §FR-035, Spec §FR-057]
- [x] CHK006 Are dashboard and shell requirements complete for both roles, including required header elements and active navigation indicator? [Completeness, Spec §US4 Acceptance, Spec §FR-039, Spec §FR-048, Spec §FR-049, Spec §FR-050, Spec §FR-051]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK007 Is the role model unambiguous across the spec (only `submitter` and `admin`) with no conflicting synonyms? [Clarity, Spec §FR-020, Spec §US1-US6]
- [x] CHK008 Are attachment constraints clearly quantified (allowed types and exact size limit in bytes) with no interpretation ambiguity? [Clarity, Spec §FR-025, Spec §FR-026]
- [x] CHK009 Is "server-side pagination" defined with enough specificity (page size semantics/metadata expectations) to avoid divergent implementations? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-054]
- [x] CHK010 Is "role-appropriate dashboard" defined with explicit widget/CTA requirements per role rather than general wording? [Clarity, Spec §US4 Acceptance, Spec §FR-050, Spec §FR-051]
- [x] CHK011 Is the success-alert auto-dismiss window concretely bounded and testable (3-5 seconds) without hidden configuration ambiguity? [Clarity, Spec §SC-013, Spec §FR-041]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK012 Do access-control requirements align between role definitions, admin-only actions, and timeline visibility constraints? [Consistency, Spec §FR-020, Spec §FR-021, Spec §FR-058]
- [x] CHK013 Do shared-idea visibility rules for employees and admin all-ideas access avoid conflict in list/detail behavior? [Consistency, Spec §FR-030, Spec §FR-031, Spec §FR-037]
- [x] CHK014 Do UX feedback requirements remain consistent between acceptance scenarios and FRs for red persistent errors and green auto-dismiss success alerts? [Consistency, Spec §US4 Acceptance, Spec §FR-040, Spec §FR-041]
- [x] CHK015 Are duplicate-submit prevention requirements consistent between loading-state rules and at-most-one request rule? [Consistency, Spec §US4 Acceptance, Spec §FR-042, Spec §FR-053]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [x] CHK016 Are acceptance scenarios measurable enough to evaluate shell/header presence and active-nav indication objectively? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §US4 Acceptance]
- [x] CHK017 Are listing filter/sort scenarios measurable enough to determine correctness without implementation assumptions? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §US2 Acceptance]
- [x] CHK018 Are timeline/history scenarios measurable for required fields (status change, actor, timestamp) and role visibility boundary? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §US3 Acceptance]
- [x] CHK019 Do success criteria include objective thresholds for alert visibility latency and duplicate-submit suppression? [Measurability, Spec §SC-011, Spec §SC-012]
- [x] CHK020 Is there explicit traceability from each success criterion to at least one FR or acceptance scenario? [Traceability, Gap]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK021 Are primary scenarios covered across auth, submit/list, evaluate, dashboard/shell, feedback safety, and accessibility workflows? [Coverage, Spec §US1-US6]
- [x] CHK022 Are alternate scenarios defined for role-based dashboard divergence and shared-idea comment visibility? [Coverage, Spec §US4 Acceptance, Spec §US3 Acceptance]
- [x] CHK023 Are exception scenarios covered for invalid/expired sessions, invalid tokens, throttling, and optimistic concurrency conflicts? [Coverage, Spec §US1 Acceptance, Spec §US3 Acceptance, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [x] CHK024 Are recovery scenarios defined after failures (retry after stale write, re-enabled controls after failed submit, focus recovery path)? [Coverage, Spec §FR-036, Spec §FR-042, Spec §FR-061]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [x] CHK025 Are boundary conditions specified for attachment size at exact limit, invalid date-range bounds, and duplicate rapid submits? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §FR-026, Spec §FR-055, Spec §FR-053]
- [x] CHK026 Are edge cases for shell integrity (missing role badge, missing active-nav indication) explicitly tied to acceptance outcomes? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §US4 Acceptance]
- [x] CHK027 Are role-leakage edge cases addressed for timeline/history and dashboard widgets shown to incorrect roles? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §FR-058, Spec §FR-050, Spec §FR-051]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [x] CHK028 Are accessibility requirements sufficiently specified for keyboard operation, ARIA semantics, and focus-to-error behavior across all primary flows? [Non-Functional, Spec §FR-059, Spec §FR-060, Spec §FR-061]
- [x] CHK029 Are security requirements complete for session model, CSRF controls, and auth/reset throttling with explicit limits and scope? [Non-Functional, Spec §FR-007, Spec §FR-013, Spec §FR-018, Spec §FR-019]
- [x] CHK030 Are performance/scalability expectations for list rendering and pagination behavior explicitly bounded to prevent unpaged large result handling? [Non-Functional, Spec §FR-054, Gap]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [x] CHK031 Are assumptions about corporate domain allowlist ownership, admin elevation process, and email delivery boundary documented as testable external dependencies? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions]
- [x] CHK032 Are cross-document dependencies (contracts, data model, tasks) aligned with the latest FR additions for listing query model, timeline audit, and a11y behavior? [Dependency, Spec §FR-054..FR-062, Gap]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [x] CHK033 Is the expected "status sort" ordering explicitly defined (lexical vs workflow order) to avoid inconsistent implementations? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-056]
- [x] CHK034 Is timeline actor identity granularity defined (email, display name, role, or immutable user ID) for audit consistency? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-057]
- [x] CHK035 Is there any conflict between "employee-visible comments for shared ideas" and admin-only timeline visibility that needs explicit separation wording? [Conflict, Spec §FR-037, Spec §FR-058]
- [x] CHK036 Is an explicit requirement-ID to task-ID mapping maintained so requirement coverage can be proven during implementation and release review? [Traceability, Gap]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add findings inline under each item with links to spec updates when needed
- Keep this checklist immutable as review evidence; create a new checklist file for a new run
